name: Jimmy Dean Country Breakfast Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9x13-inch pan well.
2. Place the bread in the pan.
3. Sprinkle with cheeses.
4. Combine the rest of the ingredients together and mix well.
5. Pour over the bread; refrigerate overnight.
6. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F, or until golden brown.
